name: CurriculumAdapter

neutralConcepts: three guards: count ceiling ≤3, protected required modules, recency guard
LearningPlanSkipped is a success — not failure
ML inference timeout → partialResults:true in successModes

ironRules.rule: Count ceiling: apply at most min(3, FREEDOM config) changes. MACHINE ceiling of 3 — never apply more than 3 curriculum changes per adaptation.
Protected invariants: drop any ML suggestion that removes a required curriculum module. Required modules are never in applied changes.
Recency guard: < 2 lessons since last adaptation → return DataProcessResult.success({ skipped: true, reason: 'TOO_RECENT' }) — emit LearningPlanSkipped. This is a success, not failure.
ML inference timeout → DataProcessResult.success({ partialResults: true }) in successModes — not failureModes.

keywords: curriculum adapter ML validation three guards count ceiling required modules recency LearningPlanSkipped
